result.stdout:
Usage: [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Open a VKV database file and start an interactive session or execute a command.

Arguments:
  [0] <string[]>

Options:
  --file <string>          Path to the .vkv file [Required]
  -t, --table <string?>    Table name to use (optional, uses first table if not specified) [Default: null]
